# Onboarding

> Organizational socialization. The process of introducing your employees to the expectations, skills, knowledge, and culture of your company.

## Software

We recommend you to install and use the following software

#### Brave Browser

https://brave.com/de/

Install and [make it your default browser](https://www.google.com/search?sxsrf=ALeKk01St0VrIeH-NYOa3DSv31ECKZ01Rw%3A1608095422334&ei=vpbZX_HrE4mxUKOKrcAH&q=How+do+I+choose+my+default+browser&oq=How+do+I+choose+my+default+browser&gs_&sclient=psy-ab&ved=0ahUKEwjxwqaj3tHtAhWJGBQKHSNFC3gQ4dUDCA0&uact=5),
and always remember [Chrome is bad](https://chromeisbad.com/).
